amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 68 d (new)
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 68 d (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission









‘(67a)

## Amendment of the European Parliament

Article 68 d

Amendment to Directive (EU) 2020/1828

In Annex I to Directive (EU) 2020/1828 of the European Parliament and of the Council ( 1a ) , the following point is added:

‘(67a) Regulation xxxx/xxxx of the European Parliament and of the Council [laying down harmonised rules on artificial intelligence (Artificial Intelligence Act) and amending certain Union legislative acts (OJ L …)]’.

Regulation xxxx/xxxx of the European Parliament and of the Council [laying down harmonised rules on artificial intelligence (Artificial Intelligence Act) and amending certain Union legislative acts (OJ L …)]’.
